title: Talvar
tmdbOverview: A hardened cop deals with three conflicting perspectives involving a brutal double murder. The case is complicated as the prime suspects are the parents who supposedly killed their teenage daughter.
synopsis: Talvar is a 2015 thriller, drama and mystery film from India. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.1 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a UA certification (IN rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
